html:
Harlaw
Allegiance House Harlaw of the Tower of Glimmering
Culture ironborn
Born 287 AC or 288 AC[1]
Father Hotho Harlaw
Book A Feast for Crows (mentioned)

Hotho Harlaw's daughter is a member of House Harlaw. Her father is the master of the Tower of Glimmering.[2] Her given name is unknown.

Contents

  • 1 Appearance
  • 2 Recent Events
    • 2.1 A Feast for Crows
  • 3 Quotes
  • 4 Family
  • 5 References

Appearance[ ]

According to Hotho Humpback, his daughter is a fair girl, newly flowered. She has blonde hair, small breasts, and good hips. Unlike her father, she does not have a hump.[2]

Recent Events[ ]

A Feast for Crows[ ]

Hotho Harlaw goes to Ten Towers hoping to persuade his widowed cousin and liege lord, Rodrik Harlaw, to marry his daughter, but Rodrik refuses.[2]

Before the kingsmoot on Old Wyk, Hotho offers his support to Victarion Greyjoy and offers the Lord Captain his daughter for his queen. Victarion promises Hotho he will take a look at the girl after he has been crowned.[3] Euron Greyjoy wins the election, however.[4]

Quotes[ ]

Victarion: How old is this daughter?
Hotho: Twelve. Fair and fertile, newly flowered, with hair the color of honey. Her breasts are small as yet, but she has good hips. She takes after her mother, more than me.[3]

—Victarion Greyjoy and Hotho Harlaw
